targets.boundary: Ambition-based emissions boundary excluding certain peripheral Scope 3 activities
targets.notes: Target follows the cross-sector absolute reduction method and was validated using the SBTi Corporate Near-Term Criteria Version 5.2.
targets.title: Reduce absolute combined Scope 1, 2 (market-based), and 3 emissions by 50% from a 2019 base year by 2030

targets.notes: Plan includes investing in carbon removal solutions to neutralize remaining emissions.
targets.title: Reach net-zero emissions across all operations and value chain by 2030
